zh.Buckinghamshire, England: 英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾
zh.lifeSummary: Mrs Richard FitzNeale於1150年之前與Richard FitzNeale在英國結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。

zh-hans.Buckinghamshire, England: 英国英格兰巴金哈姆爾
zh-hans.lifeSummary: Mrs Richard FitzNeale于1150年之前与Richard FitzNeale在英国结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

en.lifeSummary: Mrs Richard FitzNeale married Richard FitzNeale before 1150, in England. They were the parents of at least 1 son.

fr.lifeSummary: Mrs Richard FitzNeale a épousé Richard FitzNeale avant 1150, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils.

de.lifeSummary: Mrs Richard FitzNeale hat vor 1150 in England Richard FitzNeale geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn.

it.lifeSummary: Mrs Richard FitzNeale lei sposato Richard FitzNeale prima del 1150, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio.

ja.Buckinghamshire, England: イギリスイギリスブクインガムシュアイア
ja.lifeSummary: Mrs Richard FitzNealeは1150年以前にイギリスでRichard FitzNealeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Mrs Richard FitzNeale(은)는 1150년 이전 영국에서 Richard FitzNeale(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Mrs Richard FitzNeale casou-se com Richard FitzNeale antes 1150, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho.

ru.lifeSummary: Mrs Richard FitzNeale вышла замуж за человека по имени Richard FitzNeale перед 1150 г. в местности Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын.

es.lifeSummary: Mrs Richard FitzNeale se casó con Richard FitzNeale antes de 1150, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo.
